$schema_note: AIMR (AI Model Routing) capability registry v1. Providers are ordered best-first per capability. Four contracts per provider: invocation (how to call), artifact (what comes back), cost (which account pool it draws), score (benchmarked, dated, auditable to a named suite). score.source='seeded' means imported from prior benchmark findings rather than a pack-run suite. Routing skills must skip invocation.type='web-ui' entries (recorded for honesty, not routable).

image-generation.description: Text-to-image: illustrations, POD/print designs, mockups, text-in-scene graphics.

score.notes: Won 19/20 archetypes vs Flux 2 Pro (4.38), Ideogram v3 (3.98), Nano-Banana 2 (3.80). 0 misspellings/60 incl. Japanese. ~10x slower (~119s/img).

gotchas: prompts over ~150 words TIME OUT, not just slow down
aspect-ratio drift to poster orientation — lead prompt with 'Format:'
naming a living artist returns 'stream disconnected' (moderation disguised as rate limit)
no transparency ever — opaque white-BG RGB, plan a background-removal hop
~1.5MP native; upscale (4x Real-ESRGAN) for large prints
no character memory — anchor every frame with a reference PNG

score.notes: Ties recraft-v4 (3.40) and BEATS the newer flux-2-pro (2.60) — newest is not best. Strong at mascot/character craft and pixel-art.

gotchas: route text-heavy work to Ideogram or GPT Image 2 instead

score.notes: The exact-typography specialist: renders kerning literally where GPT Image 2 editorializes glyphs. First choice for logos/wordmarks. Validated only after a shootout reversal (recraft-v4 had catastrophic variance on text).

invocation.command_template: Magnific/Freepik web UI — NOT routable headlessly; MCP path is credit-metered even with UI Unlimited

score.notes: Primary fashion/editorial path at 4K with character-reference transfer. Recorded for honesty; unroutable by agents.

gotchas: UI state drifts after reload — verify references and aspect ratio
back/side product angles hallucinate construction details
duplicated subjects in over-shoulder/back prompts

image-edit.description: Reference-driven edits of an existing image: same identity/product, new scene or angle.

score.notes: Standout: clean back-detail angles — the exact angle class where Seedream hallucinates. 14-39s per call.

gotchas: ~1MP output ceiling — upscale pass for anything larger
moderation is NON-DETERMINISTIC: identical prompt can pass then block; one retry then reroute
grok image_gen (not edit) takes NO reference input — disqualified for identity work

image-to-video.description: Animate a start frame into a short clip.

score.notes: Motion-direction-following competitive with Kling (push-in/turn/orbit/walk all read correctly). The previz / high-volume low-stakes lane.

gotchas: 448-672px output — previz only, not client-facing
moderation non-deterministic, ~1 in 6-8 calls blocked (domestic framing + flash/minimal-garment combos)

invocation.command_template: Kling web UI — NOT routable headlessly

score.notes: Won every scored matched pair vs Grok i2v. 4K/5s tier produced a clean 5/5 hero clip. The production lane when resolution matters.

gotchas: start-frame upload RACE CONDITION: verify the submitted card's thumbnail before generating at premium tiers (a 900cr job rendered pure t2v, zero start-frame connection)
4K/15s tier showed no quality gain over 4K/5s — duration-only upgrade
moderation non-deterministic (credits refunded on hard blocks)

code-recon.description: Read-only codebase/web investigation: diagnosis, root-cause chains, cited research.

cost.est_per_call: ~10k tokens minimum per exec — batch questions

score.notes: Recon at xhigh effort is excellent (correct root-cause chains with accurate file:line refs; detects already-fixed bugs). Web research: ~1 factual error per 40 citations.

gotchas: literal constants are the weak spot — verify every number at file:line
NEGATIVE claims ('X does not exist') get ZERO trust until the caller probes obvious candidates
per-exec overhead ~10k tokens — never use for one-liners, batch into one session

code-implementation.description: Delegated implementation: typing out well-briefed changes in an isolated worktree.

artifact.format: git worktree + branch; caller reviews diff and merges

score.notes: 6/6 packages first-shot green with strong tests in the best wave. Review is NEVER delegated: read the full diff, run gates yourself.

gotchas: worktrees branch from ORIGIN/main — local-only commits are invisible to it; push or copy files first
sandbox can leave .git read-only — Codex does file work, caller does ALL git index/commit work
changed exported signatures: audit ALL call sites, it silently truncated two once
inline exact literal values and a SAMPLE of any data file into the brief — it assumed a flat shape for a nested JSON it never sampled

long-context-multimodal.description: Tasks needing very large context windows or native audio/video/PDF input.

score.notes: UNBENCHMARKED — drafted lane. First candidate for a pack-run suite (longcontext-v1).

gotchas: skill is a draft: verify invocation flags against the installed gemini CLI version before relying on it
